name: Syncthing
description: Peer-to-peer file synchronization between your devices
compose:
name: slashnode-syncthing
services:
  server:
    image: syncthing/syncthing:2.1.1
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/var/syncthing
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8384:8384
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-syncthing_server_data
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (syncthing). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://syncthing.net.
